room.stranger_arrives: a ragged stranger stumbles through the door...
room.stranger_gives_wood: the stranger gives you 4 wood and points outside
room.stranger_helps: standing by the fire, she says she can help

builder.level_0: a stranger huddles in the corner
builder.level_1: the stranger warms by the fire
builder.level_3: the stranger stands by the fire

outside.title: A Silent Forest
outside.desc: dry brush and dead branches litter the forest floor.
outside.pop_increase_1: a stranger arrives in the night
outside.pop_increase_few: a weathered family takes up in one of the huts.
outside.pop_increase_small: a small group arrives, all dust and bones.
outside.pop_increase_convoy: a convoy lurches in, equal parts worry and hope.
outside.pop_increase_boom: the town's booming. word does get around.
outside.pop_full: the huts are full, no room for newcomers

trap.name: trap
trap.available: builder says she can make traps to catch any creatures might still be alive out there
trap.build: more traps to catch more creatures

cart.name: cart
cart.available: builder says she can make a cart for carrying wood
cart.build: the rickety cart will carry more wood from the forest

hut.name: hut
hut.available: builder says there are more wanderers. says they'll work, too.
hut.build: builder puts up a hut, out in the forest. says word will get around.

lodge.name: lodge
lodge.available: villagers could help hunt, given the means
lodge.build: the hunting lodge stands in the forest, a ways out of town

trading_post.name: trading post
trading_post.available: a trading post would make commerce easier
trading_post.build: now the nomads have a place to set up shop, they might stick around a while
trading_post.max: you already have a trading post

tannery.name: tannery
tannery.available: builder says leather could be useful. says the villagers could make it.
tannery.build: tannery goes up quick, on the edge of the village

smokehouse.name: smokehouse
smokehouse.available: should cure the meat, or it'll spoil. builder says she can fix something up.
smokehouse.build: builder finishes the smokehouse. she looks hungry.

workshop.name: workshop
workshop.available: builder says she could make finer things, if she had the tools
workshop.build: workshop's finally ready. builder's excited to get to it

steelworks.name: steelworks
steelworks.available: builder says the villagers could make steel, given the tools
steelworks.build: a haze falls over the village as the steelworks fires up

armoury.name: armoury
armoury.available: builder says it'd be useful to have a steady source of bullets
armoury.build: armoury's done, welcoming back the weapons of the past.

steel_armour.name: Steel Armour
steel_armour.desc: Maximum protection for the farthest reaches.

torch.name: Torch
torch.desc: Illuminates the path ahead in the world.

nomad.title: The Nomad
text: a nomad shuffles into view, laden with makeshift bags.
won't say from where he came, but it's clear that he's not staying.
nomad.arrived: a nomad arrives, looking to trade
nomad.bait_effective: traps are more effective with bait.
nomad.compass_desc: the old compass is dented and dusty, but it looks to work.

noises.title: Noises
text: through the walls, shuffling noises can be heard.
can't tell what they're up to.
noises.arrived: strange noises can be heard through the walls
nothing: vague shapes move, just out of sight.
stuff: a bundle of sticks lies just beyond the threshold.

noises_in.title: Noises
text: scratching noises can be heard from the store room.
something's in there.
scales: the ground is littered with small scales.
teeth: the ground is littered with small teeth.
cloth: the ground is littered with scraps of cloth.

beggar.title: The Beggar
text: a beggar arrives.
asks for any spare furs to keep him warm at night.
beggar.scales_result: leaves a pile of small scales behind.
beggar.teeth_result: leaves a pile of small teeth behind.
beggar.cloth_result: leaves some scraps of cloth behind.

shady.title: The Shady Builder
text: a shady builder passes through.
says he can build you a hut for less wood.
shady.steal: the shady builder has made off with your wood
shady.steal_notify: the shady builder has made off with your wood
shady.build_ok: the shady builder builds a hut
shady.build_notify: the shady builder builds a hut

wanderer.title: The Mysterious Wanderer
text: a wanderer arrives with an empty cart. says if he leaves with wood, he'll be back with more.
builder's not sure he's to be trusted.
wanderer.wood_sent: the wanderer leaves, cart loaded with wood
wanderer.return_text: the mysterious wanderer returns, cart piled high with wood.
wanderer.return: the mysterious wanderer returns, cart piled high with wood.

wanderer_fur.title: The Mysterious Wanderer
text: a wanderer arrives with an empty cart. says if she leaves with furs, she'll be back with more.
builder's not sure she's to be trusted.
wanderer_fur.fur_sent: the wanderer leaves, cart loaded with furs
wanderer_fur.return_text: the mysterious wanderer returns, cart piled high with furs.
wanderer_fur.return: the mysterious wanderer returns, cart piled high with furs.

scout.title: The Scout
text: the scout says she's been all over.
willing to talk about it, for a price.
scout.arrived: a scout stops for the night
scout.map_desc: the map uncovers a bit of the world

master.title: The Master
text: an old wanderer arrives.
he smiles warmly and asks for lodgings for the night.
master.offer: in exchange, the wanderer offers his wisdom.

sick.title: The Sick Man
text: a man hobbles up, coughing.
he begs for medicine.
sick.meds_eaten: the man swallows the medicine eagerly
sick.alloy: some weird metal he picked up on his travels.
sick.cells: some weird glowing boxes he picked up on his travels.
sick.scales: all he has are some scales.
sick.nothing: the man expresses his thanks and hobbles off.

ruined.title: A Ruined Trap
text: some of the traps have been torn apart.
large prints lead away, into the forest.
nothing: the tracks disappear after just a few minutes.
catch: not far from the village lies a large beast, its fur matted with blood.
it puts up little resistance before the knife.
ruined.found_beast: there was a beast. it's dead now

fire.title: Fire
text: a fire rampages through one of the huts, destroying it.
all residents in the hut perished in the fire.

sickness.title: Sickness
text: a sickness is spreading through the village.
medicine is needed immediately.
sickness.healed: the sickness is cured in time.
death: the sickness spreads through the village.
the days are spent with burials.
the nights are rent with screams.

plague.title: Plague
text: a terrible plague is fast spreading through the village.
medicine is needed immediately.
healed: the plague is kept from spreading.
death: the plague rips through the village.
the nights are rent with screams.
the only hope is a quick death.

beast.title: A Beast Attack
text: a pack of snarling beasts pours out of the trees.
the fight is short and bloody, but the beasts are repelled.
the villagers retreat to mourn the dead.
beast.end_notify: predators become prey. price is unfair

soldier.title: A Military Raid
text: a gunshot rings through the trees.
well armed men charge out of the forest, firing into the crowd.
after a skirmish they are driven away, but not without losses.

encounter.snarlingBeast.text: A snarling beast leaps out of the underbrush!
encounter.snarlingBeast.notif: a snarling beast leaps out of the underbrush
encounter.gauntMan.text: A gaunt man approaches, a crazed look in his eye.
encounter.gauntMan.notif: a gaunt man approaches, a crazed look in his eye
encounter.strangeBird.text: A strange looking bird speeds across the plains.
encounter.strangeBird.notif: a strange looking bird speeds across the plains

setpiece.village.text: You return to the village. Familiar faces greet you.
setpiece.outpost.text: A lone outpost stands in the wasteland. There's clean water inside.

path.need_meat: You need cured meat to embark
path.unlocked: the old compass points to a dusty path...

narrate.forest_to_field: the trees yield to dry grass. the yellowed brush rustles in the wind.
narrate.forest_to_barrens: the trees are gone. parched earth and blowing dust are poor replacements.
narrate.field_to_forest: trees loom on the horizon. grasses gradually yield to a forest floor.
narrate.field_to_barrens: the grasses thin. soon, only dust remains.
narrate.barrens_to_field: the barrens break at a sea of dying grass, swaying in the arid breeze.
narrate.barrens_to_forest: a wall of gnarled trees rises from the dust.

save.export_desc: Copy the text below to backup your save
save.confirm_new: Are you sure you want to start over? All progress will be lost permanently.
